risk_matrix.name: Ricin A-chain

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Regulatory (Select Agent) + cell entry (requires B-chain or delivery vehicle)

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN shows moderate functional specificity for Ricin A-chain (FSI=1.07). Physical realizability is MODERATE (Tier 3): Regulatory (Select Agent) + cell entry (requires B-chain or delivery vehicle).

risk_matrix.name: Cholera toxin A1 subunit
risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN does not specifically recover Cholera toxin A1 subunit function (FSI=0.53). ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.53). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 2): Holotoxin assembly for cell-level toxicity.

risk_matrix.name: Botulinum neurotoxin type A

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Size + folding complexity + Tier 1 Select Agent regulation

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN strongly recovers Botulinum neurotoxin type A function from backbone (FSI=2.24). ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.03). Physical realizability is LOW (Tier 4): Size + folding complexity + Tier 1 Select Agent regulation.

risk_matrix.name: Staphylococcal enterotoxin B

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Regulatory only — biochemistry is trivially accessible

risk_matrix.interpretation: ESM-2 shows moderate confidence at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.96). Physical realizability is MODERATE (Tier 3): Regulatory only — biochemistry is trivially accessible.

risk_matrix.name: Abrin A-chain

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Regulatory (Select Agent) + cell entry (requires B-chain lectin)

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN shows moderate functional specificity for Abrin A-chain (FSI=1.10). Physical realizability is MODERATE (Tier 3): Regulatory (Select Agent) + cell entry (requires B-chain lectin).

risk_matrix.name: Tetanus toxin light chain

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Size + zinc folding + Tier 1 Select Agent regulation

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN strongly recovers Tetanus toxin light chain function from backbone (FSI=1.77). ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.14). Physical realizability is LOW (Tier 4): Size + zinc folding + Tier 1 Select Agent regulation.

risk_matrix.name: Streptolysin O

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Oligomerization on cholesterol-containing membranes required for pore function

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN does not specifically recover Streptolysin O function (FSI=0.45). ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.51). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 2): Oligomerization on cholesterol-containing membranes required for pore function.

risk_matrix.name: Anthrax protective antigen
risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN never recovers Anthrax protective antigen functional residues (FSI=0.00); these residues are structurally unusual and not constrained by backbone geometry alone. ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.65). Physical realizability is LOW (Tier 4): Multi-component assembly (PA + LF/EF) + heptamerization.

risk_matrix.name: ExoU phospholipase
risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN never recovers ExoU phospholipase functional residues (FSI=0.00); these residues are structurally unusual and not constrained by backbone geometry alone. ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.00). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 2): SpcU chaperone co-expression requirement.

risk_matrix.name: ExoS ADP-ribosyltransferase

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: None — most accessible in the panel; all barriers are minimal

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN strongly recovers ExoS ADP-ribosyltransferase function from backbone (FSI=1.72). ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.66). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 2): None — most accessible in the panel; all barriers are minimal.

risk_matrix.name: YopH protein tyrosine phosphatase

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Regulatory grey zone (Y. pestis Select Agent for the organism; recombinant protein status depends on jurisdiction)

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN does not specifically recover YopH protein tyrosine phosphatase function (FSI=0.81). ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.02). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 2): Regulatory grey zone (Y. pestis Select Agent for the organism; recombinant protein status depends on jurisdiction).

risk_matrix.name: Barnase ribonuclease

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Barstar inhibitor co-expression required to prevent host cell toxicity during E. coli expression

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN does not specifically recover Barnase ribonuclease function (FSI=0.17). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 1): Barstar inhibitor co-expression required to prevent host cell toxicity during E. coli expression.

risk_matrix.name: Colicin E2 DNase

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Im2 immunity protein required for safe handling during E. coli expression

risk_matrix.interpretation: ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.14). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 1): Im2 immunity protein required for safe handling during E. coli expression.

risk_matrix.name: CRISPR-associated protein Cas9

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: DURC regulatory considerations for some applications; size (4.1 kb gene) otherwise trivial

risk_matrix.interpretation: ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.01). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 2): DURC regulatory considerations for some applications; size (4.1 kb gene) otherwise trivial.

risk_matrix.name: Diphtheria toxin

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Assay complexity (requires EF-2 substrate) and institutional policy on former bioweapon

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN does not specifically recover Diphtheria toxin function (FSI=0.72). ESM-2 shows moderate confidence at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.95). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 2): Assay complexity (requires EF-2 substrate) and institutional policy on former bioweapon.

risk_matrix.name: Vacuolating cytotoxin A

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Oligomeric assembly and membrane reconstitution — no standard heterologous expression protocol

risk_matrix.interpretation: Physical realizability is LOW (Tier 4): Oligomeric assembly and membrane reconstitution — no standard heterologous expression protocol.
